D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

Hering Hue Cancellation

slide opposing colours into a test patch and watch it cancel all the way to neutral grey

Red-green and blue-yellow are opposed channels that cannot both be positive. Adding the opposite colour subtracts a hue until the channel reads zero.

The patch starts orange — positive red and positive yellow. Slide green to cancel the red, then blue to cancel the yellow, and watch the residual meters drop to zero as the patch turns grey.
